message:
fix(pipeline): truncatePrompt respects n byte limit with UTF-8

The previous implementation could return a string exceeding n bytes
when a multi-byte rune started before the target length but extended
past it. Now tracks the previous rune boundary to ensure the result
is always at most n bytes.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
